description_long: This is a cylindrical metal barrel with a deep reddish-brown body and a silver-gray top and bottom. The barrel features two prominent horizontal reinforcement rings encircling its body, providing structural strength. On the front, there is a large yellow triangular warning label with a black explosion symbol, indicating hazardous or explosive contents. The top of the barrel has two circular bungs or caps, typically used for filling or emptying the barrel. The surface appears slightly worn, with a matte finish and subtle textural details suggesting use in an industrial or urban environment. The overall construction and markings suggest it is designed for storing or transporting dangerous materials.
description: A reddish-brown metal barrel with a silver top and bottom, reinforced bands, and a yellow explosion warning label on the front. It has two bungs on the top and a matte, slightly worn finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow explosion warning label and both reinforcement rings clearly.
description_view_1: Side view with the label partially visible, showing the curvature and reinforcement rings.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible label, only the reddish-brown body and reinforcement rings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1 but with no label visible, showing the barrel's plain surface.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
